Description: The proteolytic cleavage of a transmembrane protein leading to the release of its intracellular or ecto-domains.

Any protein maturation process achieved by the cleavage of a peptide bond or bonds within a protein. Protein maturation is the process leading to the attainment of the full functional capacity of a protein.

Subcategory: proteolysis involved in protein catabolic process
Description: The hydrolysis of a peptide bond or bonds within a protein as part of the chemical reactions and pathways resulting in the breakdown of a protein by individual cells.
The hydrolysis of proteins into smaller polypeptides and/or amino acids by cleavage of their own peptide bonds.
